measurement_note: Size is n, the binary-array length. Every tier alternates one and zero and asks to group a growing even number of ones, leaving many candidate occurrence windows. The adjusted-position prefix-sum method and an independent rolling-cost method take O(n) time. A correct implementation that directly sums all k median distances for every occurrence window takes O(nk), completes all 8/32/126-element tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.
